statement: In every magma, Equation 3834 (`x * y = (z * z) * (w * w)`) implies Equation 3864 (`x * x = (x * (x * y)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0504
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z z) (op w w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op x (op x y)) x)
